response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source tools and developer infrastructure with strong testing practices
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX embedded contexts or Linux kernel modification
Native-level Japanese proficiency is absent; only English and Romanian are fluent
No experience with LAN-switch products, Layer-2/3 networking, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X
